error_signature: argument must be a string (was: undefined)
title: LDAP Update Node crashes on undefined values
symptom: The LDAP Update node throws an error when trying to process undefined values for attributes, causing the workflow to crash.
not_this_if: The attribute is not set to undefined in the workflow logic
root_cause: The LDAP Update node in n8n version 2.13.4+ has stricter type validation, which does not allow undefined values for attributes. This leads to errors when the logic attempts to set an attribute to undefined instead of omitting it.
fix_steps: Modify the workflow logic to omit the department attribute entirely when it should be skipped.
Ensure that the LDAP Update node does not receive undefined values for any attributes.
agent_instruction: Omit the department attribute from the LDAP Update node when the action is 'skip'.
